name: cloth-marketplace
description: CLOTH - 中国二手奢侈品时尚交易平台

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.test:scenarios: node --test scripts/api-validation-errors.test.mjs scripts/product-market-persistence.test.mjs scripts/mobile-nav-contract.test.mjs scripts/api-smoke.test.mjs && node --import tsx --test api/src/db/sqlite-store.test.ts
